exercises.title: Derive Optimal Count
exercises.description: Verify the optimal iteration formula experimentally.
exercises.starterCode:
import numpy as np

# Find optimal by simulation
for N in [16, 64, 256]:
    # Your code: run Grover with various k, find best
    pass
exercises.solution:
import numpy as np

for N in [16, 64, 256]:
    theoretical = int(np.pi/4 * np.sqrt(N))
    print(f'N={N}: optimal ≈ {theoretical}')
hints: Run for k=1 to 2*theoretical, track probabilities
